scripts.start: CORNERSTONE_DOCS_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 CORNERSTONE_DOCS_SITE_BASE_URL=/ npm run prepare && docusaurus start --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3001
scripts.build: CORNERSTONE_DOCS_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3004 CORNERSTONE_DOCS_SITE_BASE_URL=/ npm run prepare && docusaurus build --out-dir build/developer
